reviews.comment:
Quise pagar con la app y descontar puntos y que me hagan factura A y me dijeron que no es posible y si lo hago en otras ypf del ACA , lamantable el servicio

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to pay with the app and deduct points and have them issue me an A invoice, but they told me it's not possible and that I can do it at other YPF ACA locations. The service is deplorable.
